description: PLMKR Grid-Prophet knowledge base — load order for system prompt assembly

files.description: 8-dimension marketing scoring rubric, composite formula, hard gates, weight flip-conditions
Full-funnel campaign architecture, 12-week release arc, fan acquisition channels, global release architecture
DSP platform economics, music ad-creative norms, international platform dominance map, CPM benchmarks
Three output templates: Campaign Plan, Weekly Performance Memo, Pitch / PR Output
Community lifecycle model, Discord architecture, UGC cultivation, fandom psychology, superfan identification, anti-patterns
Content calendar logic, content pillar framework, short-form vs. long-form economics, email CRM lifecycle, behavioral trigger library
Press tier architecture, pitch format mechanics, pitch construction framework, PR infrastructure decision, Canada-specific outlets, EPK standards

Full measurement stack (reach/engagement/conversion/LTV layers), UTM taxonomy, attribution model selection and bias, pixel and tracking architecture, streaming attribution windows, decision-grade vs. vanity metrics, campaign post-mortem framework, dashboard architecture, and structural anti-patterns in music marketing analytics

Release format decision framework (single vs. EP vs. album by career phase), release cadence logic and anti-patterns, release timing decisions (day-of-week, seasonal windows, competition avoidance), multi-release arc sequencing (lead single criteria, follow-up single criteria, album announcement timing), and the premature album announcement pitfall

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, or entity names from source material.
notes.mock_mode: All assessment routes default to GRID_PROPHET_MOCK_MODE=true — no live Anthropic calls during testing.
